translated: It really is the Onitsuka sisters' hometown, so we've always hoped that one day,
we would be able to perform a live show in Ibaraki.
I'm so happy it's coming true. And the other artists in the lineup are just...
I was shocked. We'll do our best to show off Liella's power so we don't lose to them!
We look forward to seeing you there.
It'll be the middle of summer.
Make sure to eat well and stay healthy.
Bring sports drinks. Should we perform while holding sports drinks?
Our bodies would be covered in it. Even though it's a festival. It's too hot!
Even though it's a festival, right?
Everyone, please come and have fun with us.
Alright everyone, please stay with us until the very end.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Broadcasting Station, Liella! Let's Super Star!
